utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items appear. Now check for full specification: 
- destination: Provided (Lisbon, Portugal) — fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (September 15-19, 2024) — specific dates given — fully specified.
- transportation: Required flight details with costs. Provided: round-trip flights for 2 adults and 2 children on a budget airline, economy class, cost €500. Airline and exact flight times/numbers are not given, but the format only requires "flight details with costs"; high-level details and cost are present — acceptable as fully specified per given format.
- accommodation: Required hotel selection with costs. Provided: 4 nights at the Family Haven Hotel, cost €700 — fully specified at this level.
- activities: Required selected activities with costs. Provided three activities with costs, but each marked "suggested, not booked." The format does not require booked status, only selected activities with costs. Costs are specified — treat as fully specified.
- additional_services: Required any extra services with costs. Provided: "None" — acceptable.
- total_budget: Required complete cost breakdown. Provided: total_cost_charged €1,200 and remaining_budget €500. While not itemized to every line, it constitutes an overall breakdown tying totals to remaining budget — acceptable as complete within the given package.
Conclusion: 7/7 items included and sufficiently specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is Lisbon, Portugal; transportation is Round-trip flights on a Budget Airline, Economy Class; accommodation is Family Haven Hotel; activities include Zoo visit, Science Museum for kids, and Guided City Walking Tour (which corresponds to City Walking Tour).
